$schema: MULTIPLES economy model v1 — mirror of docs/01-economy-math-spec.md

fixedPoint.roundingRule: truncate toward zero (Math.trunc) on every fixed-point multiply/divide; no float in the rules core; deterministic across iOS/Android

constants._note: startCash/startEbitda in cents ($20,000 / $6,000). startMultiple 6x is a low seed, NOT the SOFTWARE base 14x. seed NetWorth = $56,000. congDiscountPerAddon is a POSITIVE magnitude applied as multiple *= (1 - 0.08).

formulas.F4_interest: Interest = trunc(Rate_bp * totalNetDebt / 10000), charged in cash each OPERATE
formulas.F5_dilution: newOwn_bp = trunc(oldOwn_bp * preMoney / (preMoney + raise)); preMoney = current Equity
formulas.F6_bankruptcy: Run ends when cash < 0 after interest is charged in OPERATE (cash is NOT clamped at 0; deficit is not rolled into netDebt)
formulas.tierClear: tier cleared in DEADLINE_CHECK the first round mark-to-market NetWorth >= tierBar, on or before deadline
formulas.arbitrageFlash: RENDER-ONLY: accretion = trunc(ebitda_addon * (m_platform - m_buy) / 1000); written to NO field
formulas.multipleStored: multiple is a STORED mutable field; market drift is an additive delta: multiple += trunc(multiple * (driftFactor - 1)); never resampled from sectorBase
formulas.driftDelta: driftFactor = stateFactor * (1 + sectorVol * tri), tri in [-1,1] triangular draw; multiple = max(1000, multiple + trunc(multiple*(driftFactor-1)))
formulas.reinvestEff: reinvestEff(progress) = reinvestStart + (reinvestEnd - reinvestStart) * min(1, progress); progress = roundInTier(zero-indexed) / deadline
formulas.synergySameSector: ebitda += addon.ebitda + trunc(addon.ebitda * synergySameSector); multiple unchanged
formulas.congDrag: multiple = trunc(multiple * (1 - congDiscountPerAddon)) per cross-sector add-on (unit = one add-on; stacks multiplicatively as 0.92^n)
formulas.addonPrice: price = trunc(addon.ebitda * m_buy / 1000); cash -= price; netDebt += faceDebt
formulas.exit: exitEV = trunc(ebitda * exitMultiple / 1000); proceeds = trunc((exitEV - netDebt) * ownership / 10000); cash += proceeds; remove venture
formulas.dividendRecap: cash += trunc(EV * recapPct); netDebt += trunc(EV * recapPct)
formulas.reseed: seedEbitda = trunc(carrySeedFrac * NetWorth * 1000 / reseedMult); deltas applied via resolver as a system event (obeys invariant, logged)
formulas.decay: ebitda -= trunc(ebitda * decayRate[min(roundsNeglected,3)]); multiple -= trunc(multiple * multDecayRate); halved for passive ventures

roundOrder: 2. apply drift delta to each venture stored multiple (floor 1000)
4. neglect decay on ventures with roundsNeglected>=1, then increment
6. charge interest: cash -= interestDue; if cash<0 -> BANKRUPTCY

sectors.name: SOFTWARE
sectors.signature: Steady earnings but spiky multiple; bubbles hardest, highest ceiling, whips most in a crunch.

sectors.name: SERVICES
sectors.signature: Labor-heavy; EBITDA spiky round-to-round, modest multiple.

sectors.name: RETAIL
sectors.signature: Cash-rich but multiple-poor; high cash yield flavour, low valuation ceiling.

sectors.name: INDUSTRIAL
sectors.signature: Asset-heavy, slow, crash-resistant; the defensive holdco anchor at T4.

sectors.name: CONSUMER
sectors.signature: POST-LAUNCH (GDD §8 Q6): brand-y mid-multiple, steady. Reputation-GATED — unlocks on beating the game; not in the base draw pool.

sectors.name: MEDIA
sectors.signature: POST-LAUNCH (GDD §8 Q6): SOFTWARE++ — highest multiple, highest vol, whips hardest in a bubble/crunch. Reputation-GATED; unlocks on beating the game.

_sectorsNote: baseMultiple in milli-units. Used ONLY to seed a new venture's multiple at creation and as sectorNorm for exit-quality reputation; NOT a per-round resample source. CONSUMER + MEDIA are the two POST-LAUNCH sectors (GDD §8 Q6): they parse + carry economy bands but are reputation-gated out of the base draw pool until the player beats the game (meta.dart kPostLaunchSectors / applyUnlocks).

tierBars.who: The fork: exit serial or empire

_tierBarsNote: bar values in integer cents; barDisplay is the human label

perTierLine.note: from $56k SEED net worth, not $20k pocket cash

optimalGrowth.note: decay forced by reinvestDecay; player must switch levers (arbitrage/leverage/exit) to hold the line

reinvestDecay.formula: start + (end - start) * min(1, roundInTier/deadline); roundInTier zero-indexed; clamps to end past deadline

crunch.financing: new TAKE_DEBT and financing cards DISABLED or COLD-priced (GDD Q3); existing debt still accrues at spiked rate

interestBand.formula: rate = (interestMin + (interestMax-interestMin)*U[0,1]) * marketRateMul; U from one mulberry32 draw

driftModel.perVentureJitter: driftFactor = stateFactor * (1 + sectorVol * tri); tri in [-1,1] = (u1+u2-1) two uniform draws (triangular), deterministic from RNG cursor
driftModel.application: ADDITIVE delta to stored multiple in OPERATE step 2; never a resample of sectorBase
driftModel.telegraph: next-round direction shown by HOT/COLD gauge; magnitude never revealed
driftModel.note: semi-deterministic, readable a round ahead; never a hidden stochastic surprise

dangerLeverage.gauge: Interest(maxCrunchRate, totalNetDebt) vs projectedCash turns red a full round before possible F6

synergyAndConglomerate.note: flat +20% same-sector in v1; escalating-curve alternative flagged for full-model Monte-Carlo

decay.metric: roundsNeglected (reset to 0 by any Act targeting the venture)
decay.note: GDD Q4 locked: 1 neglected round = small dip, 3 = real pain. Passive (Hire-CEO) ventures decay at half rate and grow slower.

DIVIDEND_RECAP.warning: can be fatal; classic F6 setup

HOT_WINDOW.deltas: none; arms market.hotWindowArmed for next EXIT

EARN_OUT.deltas: cash += 0 now; deferred cash -= trunc(pct*ebitda) for N rounds

resolverInputs.invariant: every card/consumable/event AND every system event (drift, decay, organicGrowth, reseed) may ONLY mutate these five fields via a {deltas} object; NEVER a flat +score

clamps.cash: NOT clamped at 0; cash < 0 after interest charge = bankruptcy (F6)

resolverInputs.directionalityRule: magnitudes gamified; signs/structure real (leverage magnifies both ways, arbitrage accretive, dilution shrinks slice)

tuningKnobs.name: carrySeedFrac
tuningKnobs.note: biggest difficulty lever; momentum carried between tiers. Up=easier. R12 tune: was 0.24 (full-model floor T2 clear measured 2.5%; post-reseed demand eased to ~1.39x/round).

tuningKnobs.name: deadlineRounds
tuningKnobs.note: T2 is the squeeze; loosen here first if floor death-rate >40%. R12 tune: T2 8 -> 10 (the doc 01 §8 trigger fired at 42.4%); T1 8 -> 9 for tutorial-tier feel (floor missed-deadline 26% -> 18%).

tuningKnobs.name: organicGrowthDefault
tuningKnobs.note: raises floor without touching skill ceiling; attributed to seed/hired partner, not free engine drift. R12 tune: was 0.10 (floor compounding sat under every tier's needed rate; floor win 4-7%).

tuningKnobs.name: reinvestStart
tuningKnobs.note: with reinvestEnd controls how hard lever-switching is forced.

tuningKnobs.name: reinvestEnd
tuningKnobs.note: raise to flatten (easier), lower to steepen (harder).

tuningKnobs.name: interestMax
tuningKnobs.note: down raises the bankruptcy floor for levered play. R12 tune: was 0.14 (a top-of-band neutral draw out-billed the 0.35 cash yield from ~2.5x leverage; greedy bankruptcy 22%).

tuningKnobs.name: dangerLeverage
tuningKnobs.note: how greedy a player can get before the gauge turns red.

tuningKnobs.name: synergySameSector
tuningKnobs.note: reward for focused roll-ups; watch for runaway accretion.

tuningKnobs.name: congDiscountPerAddon
tuningKnobs.note: steepness of the conglomerate self-limit; positive magnitude, multiple *= (1-this).

tuningKnobs.name: recapPct
tuningKnobs.note: dividend-recap aggression; primary greed-death dial alongside crunch. R12 tune: was 0.30 (one pull landed ~2.4x EBITDA of debt at a stroke; greedy lived AT its leverage line and died out of band).

tuningKnobs.name: decayRate
tuningKnobs.note: neglect punisher by rounds neglected; halved for passive ventures.

tuningKnobs.name: driftCrunch
tuningKnobs.note: greed-punishment dial; tune so greedy bankruptcy ~8-12%.

tuningKnobs.name: crunchRateMul
tuningKnobs.note: interest spike in a crunch; primary F6 trigger for over-levered play. R12 tune: was 1.8 (with crunch entry 0.18 -> 0.12 in curves.driftModel.transitionAtBoundary — together they put greedy bankruptcy in the 8-12% band instead of 22-30%).

outOfScope.reputationAccrual: full reputation curve lives in meta layer (doc 02 MetaState); this doc only defines sectorNorm = sectorBase so exit-quality term (exitMultiple/sectorNorm*ownership) is computable

simCheck.scope: FLOOR-ONLY smoke test: organic growth + lever-to-target + reinvest + market-ride. Does NOT model arbitrage, synergy, exits, decay, PLAYS, or crunch-disabled financing.
simCheck.floorStrategy: each round: (1) debt up to targetLeverage*EBITDA if not crunch; (2) reinvest free cash above a 1-round interest buffer at reinvestEff(progress); (3) never exit/arbitrage; (4) advance when NetWorth>=bar. Greedy variant: lever to 5.8x, no buffer.
simCheck.fullModelMonteCarlo: P1 deliverable: rebuild harness with synergy/arbitrage/exits/decay/PLAYS before claiming full validation
